title: whiteout
description: A beautifull white pack with a transparent gui. Made for crystal pvp
body:
![PREVIEW](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab28ea6a66f583aedf47a240f45ea315b17d9498.png)THIS RESOURCEPACK FEATURES:

• **Revamped Enchantment Glint**: The enchantment effect has been reimagined with a sleek, subtle glow that enhances enchanted items without overpowering their appearance, adding a touch of sophistication to your gear.  

• **Crystal Models**: Crystals now feature intricately detailed and modernized 3D models, giving them a sharp, polished look that makes them stand out as unique treasures in your world.  

• **Polished Item Icons**: Item textures have been refined to deliver a clean, uniform appearance across your inventory, improving both usability and aesthetics for a smoother gameplay experience.  

• **Enhanced HUD Design**: The heads-up display is updated with simplified, minimalist visuals, ensuring a distraction-free and immersive playstyle.  

• **Modernized Block Textures**: Select blocks are given a subtle overhaul to align with the pack’s sleek theme, maintaining compatibility with vanilla Minecraft while elevating the visual experience.  

• **Improved Visual Clarity**: The overall design minimizes visual noise, ensuring key gameplay elements remain clear and easy to distinguish, perfect for both casual and competitive players.
